title: Extra main-program line
description: Add 1 line to the main program.

title: Stronger portal
description: Each portal split creates 1 extra ball.

title: Center bucket bonus
description: 'center_ball' earns +5 extra points in the center bucket.

title: Helper editor lines
description: Add 2 lines to the helper editor.

title: Portal chain
description: Balls created by a portal split can split one more time if they hit a portal.
